queue.objective: Audit the rest of LUCIDOTA against intended functionality, then reduce LOC/slop without losing abilities: every subsystem keeps or improves function, proof receipts required, reuse existing/FOSS code first, asymmetric routing and construction laws stay active. Apply the systemwide elegance standard: one source of truth/authority, ontology-driven packets, deterministic-first algorithms, self-teaching/auditing/red-team receipts, many thin interfaces, no capability loss, and written justification for helpers that exceed the ~100 LOC burden-of-proof target. Core LUCIDOTA must remain runnable without any cloud model; cloud is optional capacity, never a dependency.
queue.title: GOAL 5 — System Elegance / Slimming War Game

queue.objective: Design and prove a bounded continuation launcher/handoff protocol: parse messy operator instructions into typed work orders/conversation commands, preserve local-first sovereign truth/OSINT/newsroom ontology intent, hand off before long-session limits, and never self-kill or spawn autonomous yolo loops without an explicit current-session operator approval and receipts.
queue.title: GOAL 6 — Operator Parse + Safe Automation Continuity

queue.objective: Upgrade instruction hygiene into a real shared language subsystem for build mode and operator mode: deterministic GO ontology/JSON work-order translation, brevity/verbosity control, output templates for operator/email/code/research, fast/slow/model routing hooks, DB ontology refresh path, ABSURD-required workflow packet, hypertimeline hook, Percyphon/FairyFuse/kernel reuse, CLI/operator entrypoint parity, and proof receipts. Reuse local language_membrane/template/fast_slow/fairyfuse/percyphon/kernel/CEP/ABSURD pieces first; keep new helpers under 100 LOC and no graph/model side effects on the routing fast path. Cloud is optional, never required for baseline routing or execution.
